title: Translation Request NGE pen and paper RPG
display_title: Translation Request NGE pen and paper RPG
wikitext:
[]: [Translation Request] NGE pen and paper RPG             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Thu Jun 18, 2015 8:59 pm The late Delispin has acquired the pen and paper RPG, "Nerv White Papers", during the gap between his death and prophesied return to once again bless the forum with his presence, and is looking for someone to help translate the text. Anyone willing to help?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jun 18, 2015 10:25 pm This isn't something long ago translated on the Eva Mailing List back in the day? Kinda surprised if it wasn't since it's such an old thing!

[]:             Quote Post by Tumbling Down » Mon Jun 29, 2015 12:12 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: This isn't something long ago translated on the Eva Mailing List back in the day? Kinda surprised if it wasn't since it's such an old thing!
